reviews.comment:
Limpieza en los baños y buena atención.  No se entiende la poca disponibilidad de surtidores para proveerse de combustible que generan largas colas y demoras en el viajero. Se debe reveer ese aspecto. Hará falta una competencia? Muy mezquino el ACA  no el concesionario

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms and good service. The limited availability of fuel pumps, which causes long lines and delays for travelers, is incomprehensible. This aspect should be reviewed. Will competition be needed? The ACA is very stingy, not the concessionaire.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwazlfQ3VnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una parada casi obligatoria antes de adentrarse más en el norte (o volviendo de) de Argentina. El YPF Full cuenta con un variado surtido de cosas para que recargues energía en tu viaje. Los baños se encuentran limpios tanto los de la estación como los que están dentro de la confitería.

(Translated by Google)
A near-mandatory stop before venturing further north (or returning from) Argentina. The YPF Full offers a wide variety of items to help you recharge during your trip. Both the restrooms at the station and those inside the café are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwNnVuV1ZREAE

reviews.comment:
En el bar, hay que esperar mucho para ser atendido.

(Translated by Google)
In the bar, you have to wait a long time to be served.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwb3ZXdzB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siendo turista y de paso . Solicite gasoil grado3 para mi vehículo.  Me dijeron que no tenían en ningún de los surtidores disponibles.  Como no tenia combustible para seguir viaje me vendieron gasoil común con los riesgos que eso implica.  Luego de un instante veo que a un señor en una C-10 doble cabina blanca le estaban cargando GASOIL GRADO3 INFINIA DIESEL ... Una muy lamentable desicion del titular de la firma ... La palabra responsable lo corresponde .

(Translated by Google)
As a tourist passing through, I requested Grade 3 diesel for my vehicle. They told me they didn't have it at any of the available pumps. Since I didn't have enough fuel to continue my trip, they sold me regular diesel, with all the risks that entails. A moment later, I saw a man in a white double-cab C-10 being filled up with Grade 3 Infinia Diesel... A very regrettable decision by the owner of the company... The word responsible applies to him.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwblBpNmZREAE

reviews.comment:
En el bar aparte que demoran una eternidad, te atienden con muy mala onda, como si te hicieran un favor, encima te estafan. Ya se les acaba el monopolio cuando abran la Shell.

(Translated by Google)
At the bar, aside from the fact that the service takes forever, they're incredibly rude, acting like they're doing you a favor, and then they rip you off. Their monopoly will end when the Shell station opens.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwZ0s2Nmx3RRAB
